title: 🦫 Beaver Bank Blitz
description: 🦫 Bounce into action with the Beaver Bank Blitz! Scale embankments, scoop stray litter, and make the canal sparkle. Families, first-time volunteers, and furry friends welcome! All gear provided — just wear sturdy shoes and gloves. 🍃
perks: Free parking 🚗, family-friendly fun, fresh air & community vibes 🌞

title: 🌿 Greenford Growth Groom
description: 🌿 Join us for Greenford Growth Groom! We'll cut back overgrown vegetation, keeping the towpath safe, open, and welcoming. All equipment provided, just wear sturdy shoes and gloves. Families, first-time volunteers, and nature lovers welcome! 🍃
perks: All equipment supplied, family-friendly, fresh air & teamwork outdoors

title: 🚤 Hillingdon Narrowboats Open Day
meetingPoint: The Boathouse, Summerhouse Lane, Harefield, UB9 6HX
description: 🚤 Explore the heart of Hillingdon Narrowboats Association! Join us for an open day at The Boathouse on Summerhouse Lane. Meet the team, tour our fleet, and learn about our community boating initiatives. All ages welcome.
perks: Meet the team, tour the fleet, learn about community boating

title: 🦡 Bankside Brush & Bin Blitz
description: 🎨 Brush, Bin, and Beautify! Join us along the towpath to sweep away litter, tackle graffiti on the mural, and brighten up Bankside. We'll head towards Parkside Yards where complimentary refreshments are provided. Families, first-timers, and community champions welcome!
perks: All equipment provided, family-friendly, fun & fresh air 🌞

title: November 243 Ealing Road!
meetingPoint: Venice House, 243 Ealing Road, Alperton, HA0 1QL
description: Join the 243 Ealing Road crew at Venice House for a morning of autumn canal cleanup! 🍂 Help gather litter, clear overgrown areas, and make our local waterways sparkle. Families, first-time volunteers, and experienced canal enthusiasts are all welcome. All equipment provided — just bring your energy and enthusiasm!
perks: Meet like-minded people, enjoy the outdoors, give back 🌞

title: 🤝 FoGUC AGM 2026
meetingPoint: Grand Union Community Hub, 1 Quay Walk, Wembley, HA0 1DY
description: 🤝 Join us for the Friends of Grand Union Canal Annual General Meeting — an evening to celebrate our progress, share ideas for the year ahead, and connect with fellow canal supporters. Light refreshments will be provided, and everyone is welcome to take part! 🌊
perks: Meet volunteers and local supporters, refreshments available ☕, on-site parking 🅿️ (charges may apply)
bring: Note-taking materials or questions you'd like to raise

title: 🌳Go Greenford!🌳 Celebration Litter Pick and Award Presentation with the Mayor of Ealing
description: 🏰 Come and join our celebration litter pick with Cllr Anthony Kelly the Mayor of Ealing! We are delighted that he will present our volunteers with a civic award as thanks for their canalside clean-ups over many years. Local residents, old friends, first-timers, and canal enthusiasts are all welcome to join in! Litter picking equipment will be provided. To help us assess numbers, please register via the eventbrite link below. See you there!
perks: Meet the Mayor and friendly community volunteers, do your bit for the environment - and maybe get your face in the papers! 🌞

title: 🌿 Join in the Great British Spring Clean at Alperton! 🌿
meetingPoint: Carlyon Rd / Water Rd Footbridge, Wembley HA0 1HX
description: ⭐ note change of venue, now as above ⭐  🌿 The 'Great British Spring Clean' is a fantastic opportunity to get outside in the fresh air and help clean up your local community. Join us and the Canal & River Trust in tackling this litter hotspot to give the area a lift. All tools and equipment will be provided, together with expert and friendly support. All under 16's need to be accompanied by an adult. This is a great way to meet other local volunteers and spend a few hours outdoors improving your local waterway environment. If possible, please sign up to let us know you plan on coming along. 🍃
perks: All equipment supplied, family-friendly, fresh air & teamwork outdoors
bring: Please wear old clothes appropriate for the weather conditions (e.g. waterproof jacket, warm layers) and sturdy footwear ideally boots or wellies

title: 🌿 Join in the Great British Spring Clean at Greenford Quay! 🌿
description: 🌿 The 'Great British Spring Clean' is a fantastic opportunity to get outside in the fresh air and help clean up your local community. Join us and the Canal & River Trust in tackling this litter hotspot to give the area a lift. All tools and equipment will be provided, together with expert and friendly support. All under 16's need to be accompanied by an adult. This is a great way to meet other local volunteers and spend a few hours outdoors improving your local waterway environment. If possible, please sign up to let us know you plan on coming along. 🍃
perks: All equipment supplied, family-friendly, fresh air & teamwork outdoors
bring: Please wear old clothes appropriate for the weather conditions (e.g. waterproof jacket, warm layers) and sturdy footwear ideally boots or wellies

title: 🌿🚮 Join the Great British Spring Clean at Engineer's Wharf! 🚮🌿
description: 🌿 Why not have a go litter picking with friendly neighbours, starting at Engineer's Wharf by the peaceful Grand Union Canal? The 🚮'Great British Spring Clean'🚮 is a great opportunity to get out in the fresh air to give your local area a lift. Not done it before? Never mind, all tools and equipment will be provided, together with friendly support. This is a great way to meet other local volunteers and spend a few hours outdoors improving the waterway environment. All under 16's need to be accompanied by an adult. Free Parking is usually available in the nearby square, or on Adrienne Avenue on the opposite bank of the canal 🍃
perks: All equipment supplied, family-friendly, fresh air & teamwork outdoors
bring: Please wear old clothes appropriate for the weather (e.g. waterproof jacket, warm layers) and sturdy footwear ideally boots or wellies

title: 🏰 April Old Crown Canal Cleanup!
meetingPoint: The Old Crown, Station Road, Hayes, UB3 4BG
description: 🏰 Clear and Care! Join the Hillingdon Litter Pickers at the Old Crown for a friendly community canal cleanup in Hayes. Families, first-timers, and canal enthusiasts are all welcome! 🍃 The pub proudly raises money for Hillingdon Litter Pickers and offers volunteers a free first drink after the event — a perfect way to celebrate a good deed! 🍻 All gear provided.
perks: Free first drink at the Old Crown, support local causes, meet community volunteers 🌞

title: 🦡 Willowtree Wombling for National Nature Day!
meetingPoint: Willowtree Marina, West Quay Drive, Yeading, UB4 9TA
description: 🦡 Come join us for a day of fun and adventure, meeting at Willowtree Marina. It's the national Day of Action for Nature, Parks and Green Spaces, so get ready to embrace your inner womble and help keep Willow Tree Open Space and the canal towpath near Spikes Bridge Park clean and beautiful. We'll provide all the gear you need to pick up litter and make a difference in our community. Let's show some love to our beautiful surroundings together! Parking is free (but do register your car on arrival) or take the E6 bus to nearby Yeading Tesco. 🍃
perks: Meet new friends, enjoy the fresh air, and make a positive impact on the environment 🌞

title: 🤝 Hayes Canal Festival
description: 🎉 Celebrate the waterways at the Hayes Canal Festival! Enjoy community stalls, family activities, local groups, and canal-themed fun along the Grand Union. A relaxed and friendly day out for all ages by the waterside. 🌊
perks: Family-friendly activities, community stalls, info from local groups, refreshments available ☕
bring: Comfortable shoes, water, and enthusiasm for canal-side fun!
